message:
chore: update workspace config, add fsqlite-c-api member, and refresh bead tracking

Workspace (Cargo.toml):
- Add fsqlite-c-api to workspace members list.
- Add fsqlite (re-export crate) to workspace dependencies for use by
  the C-API shim.

Cargo.lock:
- Regenerated to include fsqlite-c-api and updated dependency graph.

Harness (fsqlite-harness/Cargo.toml):
- Add fsqlite-func dev-dependency for UDF registration tests.

Bead tracking (.beads/issues.jsonl):
- Update issue status and close reasons for completed beads including
  planner stats, VDBE opcode coverage, UDF registration, function
  compatibility, lock contention, SQL conformance, and parser
  conformance work items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
